data.title: Samourai Wallet CTO Gets 4 Years in Prison For $2B Bitcoin Laundering Scheme
data.description:

data.title: Whale Investor Opens New ETH Position Amid Recent Losses
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, HyperInsight monitoring reveals that a significant investor, identified by the address 0x8d0, has opened a new long position in Ethereum (ETH) at $3,021, with a position size of approximately $15.11 million. This move comes after the investor, who has made over 30 long trades this month mostly resulting in losses, closed previous ETH and Solana (SOL) positions today with a modest profit of around $400,000.

Since November 3, the investor has been actively trading multiple cryptocurrencies with a weekly success rate of 27%. Despite experiencing monthly losses that once reached $6.7 million, these have slightly narrowed to $5.32 million. The account currently holds $13.7 million in funds.

data.title: Bitcoin Market Sentiment Analyzed Through PSIP Metrics
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on-chain data analyst Murphy has highlighted the significance of the Profit Supply Percentage (PSIP) in assessing market sentiment for Bitcoin. The seven-day average of PSIP has fallen below 70%, a level historically associated with the initial downturn from bullish to bearish cycles, often followed by a rebound after extreme sentiment pressure. When PSIP drops below 50%, it typically signals a deep bearish phase, presenting a potentially optimal buying opportunity.

Currently, Bitcoin is priced at $92,000, with UPPD data indicating that 6.7 million BTC are in a state of unrealized loss, accounting for 33% of the total circulation. If low-positioned holders refrain from selling, a price drop to $59,000 would result in 9.744 million BTC becoming trapped, aligning PSIP around 50%. As PSIP is dynamic, its static evaluation offers only an approximate range. Experience suggests that if Bitcoin enters the $60,000 to $70,000 range, PSIP is likely to fall below 50%, marking the onset of a deep bearish phase.

data.title: The crypto fear and greed index has fallen to 11, indicating the market remains in a state of "extreme fear."
data.description: Alternative data shows that the cryptocurrency fear and greed index is at 11 today, continuing its downward trend from yesterday's 15. The weekly average was also 15, indicating that market sentiment has been in the "extreme fear" range for several consecutive days. It's worth noting that the index touched 10 on November 15th, marking its lowest level since February 27th.

data.title: Binance Launches Lorenzo Protocol (BANK) Token Reward Campaign
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, a new campaign on CreatorPad offers verified users the opportunity to unlock 1,890,000 Lorenzo Protocol (BANK) token voucher rewards by completing simple tasks. CreatorPad, a platform on Binance Square, allows users to earn token rewards through task completion. The activity period is set from 2025-11-20 09:00 (UTC) to 2025-12-22 09:00 (UTC).

Participants can engage in various tasks to qualify for a share of 1,701,000 BANK in token vouchers. Additionally, 189,000 BANK token vouchers are reserved for the top 50 creators on the Square Creator Leaderboard, based on the 7-day rankings at the activity's launch. To participate, users must complete tasks such as following the project's account on Binance Square and X, creating content with specific hashtags, and trading a minimum of $10 equivalent in BANK on Binance Spot, Futures, or Convert.

The reward structure is based on the leaderboard results at the activity's end. The top 100 creators on the BANK 30D Project Leaderboard will share 1,323,000 BANK, while remaining eligible participants will share 378,000 BANK equally. An additional 189,000 BANK reward pool is allocated for the top 50 creators on the Square Creator Leaderboard, divided among three ranking groups.

Eligibility requires account verification, and certain restrictions apply, such as the exclusion of bulk-registered accounts and risk users. Participants must maintain their campaign-related posts for at least 60 days post-activity. Binance reserves the right to amend terms and conditions and disqualify participants who violate guidelines. Voucher rewards will be distributed within 14 working days after the activity ends, with a validity period of seven days from distribution.

data.title: Binance Postpones GAIBUSDT Perpetual Contract Trading
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the trading start time for the GAIBUSDT Perpetual Contract, initially scheduled for 2025-11-20 at 09:00 (UTC), has been postponed until further notice. This delay affects users who were anticipating the launch of this trading option on the Binance platform. The decision to postpone the trading start time was made to ensure optimal conditions and readiness for the contract's introduction. 

Binance has not provided a new date for when the GAIBUSDT Perpetual Contract will become available, leaving traders to await further updates. The GAIB token is set to be available on Binance Alpha and Binance Futures, expanding its reach within the Binance ecosystem. Users are advised to stay informed through official Binance channels for any forthcoming announcements regarding the rescheduling of the trading start time. The postponement reflects Binance's commitment to maintaining a stable and secure trading environment for its users.

data.title: XRP Supply Shock Ahead? ETFs Could Consume It All, Analyst Predicts
data.description:
A new projection from an XRP analyst is drawing fresh attention to how quickly spot ETFs could gobble up available tokens if heavy inflows persist. Related Reading: With 42% Of XRP Holders Underwater, Analysts Say The Altcoin Could Crash Even Further The numbers in the model are simple and large, and they force a straightforward question: what happens if steady ETF buying meets a limited public supply? ETF Flows Could Outrun Supply According to analyst Chad Steingraber, one XRP ETF might average $90 million in daily inflows. Multiplying that by 12 ETFs and the result is $1. 08 billion each day
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/xrp-supply-shock-ahead-etfs-could-consume-it-all-analyst-predicts/

data.title: A Bitcoin whale that shorted BTC four times with 20x leverage now has a floating profit of over $23.7 million.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that the whale (0x5D2...9bb7) who previously shorted BTC four times consecutively has recently opened a 20x leveraged Bitcoin short position, which is now showing a floating profit of over $23.7 million. Currently, its short position holds approximately 1232 BTC, with a position value of $113.6 million, an average entry price of $111,499.3, and a liquidation price of $101,637.7. Furthermore, just two days ago, this whale also placed four limit buy orders totaling 1450 BTC in the $75,819-$79,919 price range.

data.title: Polymarket's forecast for the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve in December has fallen to 30%.
data.description: According to Polymarket data, the probability of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in December has fallen to 30%, while the probability of keeping rates unchanged has risen to 68%. The trading volume for this predicted event has reached $123.6 million.
